dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The acrid smell of dust and blood filled his nostrils. A familiar scent, one he thought he'd forgotten forever.

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: This... this isn't right. I died. I remember dying.

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: The final battle... against the Outer Gods... I failed. Everything was consumed. My body, my power, my very existence.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Welcome, Player. You have entered the Tutorial.]

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: The Tutorial? This voice... it's been so long. Too long.

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: My body... it's young again. Weak. Pathetic. But... this is it. I'm back.

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: The past... the future... it's all laid out before me. This time, I won't make the same mistakes. I won't let them fall.

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: The Gods... the Outer Gods... they will pay. Every single one of them who watched, who betrayed, who laughed.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [First Test: Eliminate all Goblins in the designated area. Remaining: 10.]

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: Goblins. How quaint. I remember this. The first test. The one where everyone struggles, where the weak are culled.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRRRR!

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: They're weak, but numerous. A typical trap for beginners who rush in without thinking. A test of composure, not strength.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWIP!

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: But I'm not a beginner. Not anymore.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHIZZ! CRACK!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [You have defeated a Goblin. Remaining: 9.]

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: Pathetic. Even with this weak body, my senses, my experience... they remain. The muscle memory, the knowledge of their pressure points.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHANK! GURGLE!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [You have defeated a Goblin. Remaining: 8.]

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: This body is a cage. But it's a cage I know how to break out of. Faster this time. Much, much faster.

dialogue.speaker: GENERIC PARTICIPANT
dialogue.line: H-Help! There are too many! My sword... I dropped it!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANG!

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: Fool. Panic is the first step to death in the Tower. And a waste of my time.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD! THUD! SLASH! STAB!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [You have defeated a Goblin. Remaining: 1.]

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: Just one left. And it's hiding. A common tactic for the 'leader' type, thinking itself cunning.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SNIFF SNIFF

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: Too slow.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRUNCH!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [You have defeated all Goblins in the designated area.]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [First Test Cleared!]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Reward: 100 CP. Basic Strength Potion (F).]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [You have gained 1 point in Strength.]

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: CP... Strength Potion... it's all exactly as I remember. The first steps of a journey I've already walked.

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: This is just the beginning. A long, arduous path lies ahead. A path filled with trials, betrayals, and the eyes of the Gods.

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: But this time, I know the way. I know the shortcuts, the hidden quests, the weaknesses of the Gods themselves.

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: The Gods who watched as the world burned. The Gods who betrayed us for their own games.

dialogue.speaker: KIM YUWON
dialogue.line: They will regret letting me return. The Tower... it will tremble.

summary: Kim Yuwon, a regressor, wakes up in the Tutorial, realizing he's returned to the past. Armed with knowledge of the future, he ruthlessly clears the first test, vowing to climb the Tower and exact revenge on the Gods who betrayed humanity.
